title: That's My Daddy
writer: Pierre Couderc, Albert DeMond, Reginald Denny
actors: Reginald Denny, Barbara Kent, Lillian Rich
plot: Wealthy bachelor Jimmy Norton, engaged to a gold digger, lies his way out of a speeding ticket by claiming to be on his way to visit his daughter at the Children's Hospital. The policeman gives him an escort to the hospital. There...
